parameters.name: search_photos
parameters.description: Search Unsplash for free photos matching a keyword. Returns image URLs plus photographer attribution. Parameters: query (required), limit (optional, default 5, max 20), orientation (optional: landscape|portrait|squarish).

parameters.name: get_random_photo
parameters.description: Get a single random Unsplash photo. Parameters: query (optional topic filter), orientation (optional: landscape|portrait|squarish).

parameters.name: get_photo
parameters.description: Get detailed info about a specific Unsplash photo including tags, dimensions, likes, and location. Parameters: photo_id (required, e.g. eAAjKAGEKmI).
